heading: Severability
label: 136x Severability
text: If any provision of this subchapter or the application thereof to any person or circumstance is held invalid, the invalidity shall not affect other provisions or applications of this subchapter which can be given effect without regard to the invalid provision or application, and to this end the provisions of this subchapter are severable.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 34 of , was renumbered section 35 and is classified to .act June 25, 1947, ch. 125section 136y of this title
Effective DateFor effective date of section, see , set out as a note under .section 4 of Pub. L. 92–516section 136 of this title
